{"ID":194000019,"TalkGroupID":194000016,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"DialogOptionID":[194000006,194000007],"TalkDescEditor":"你们神锋门都这么……你怎么就拔剑了！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000020,"TalkGroupID":194000016,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"我乃神锋门弟子凌霄，随家师前来拜访孤叶宗，听闻阁下与魔道魁首七煞门一战，大放异彩，又通过五大宗门考验，力保孤叶宗，阁下为人功法，实在是令人神往。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000021,"TalkGroupID":194000016,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"又听闻阁下与我修为相仿，我特地请求师父带我来此，便是为了与阁下切磋一番，不知道道友可否愿意？","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000023,"TalkGroupID":194000016,"NpcIndex":-1,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"你们神锋门都这么……你怎么就拔剑了！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":194000051,"TalkGroupID":194000034,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"（略显失落）这样啊……我会等到道友想要切磋那日，今日我就先告辞了。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001091,"TalkGroupID":211001054,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"道友功法果真如传闻那样精妙绝伦，我神锋门以剑入道，总有一天我会追上道友的功法，到时我再与道友一战！","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":59000001,"TalkGroupID":59000001,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"多谢赐教，多道友功法真是精妙，我只是吃了剑术上的上风，道友稍加时日，定能追上于我。 ","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":59000002,"TalkGroupID":59000001,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"等道友有所进阶.我再登门拜访.希望道友不客赐教！ ","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}
